parameters.command: cd /opt/crypto_agent_system && echo '=ESTADO SISTEMA=' && docker compose ps --format '{{.Name}} {{.Status}}' && echo '=CLAUDE.md=' && head -60 CLAUDE.md && echo '=ULTIMAS ALERTAS=' && docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d crypto_agent -c "SELECT token_symbol, score, sent_at FROM alerts ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null
